author: doll-agent
content: Add var_ddof and std_ddof scalar methods plus var_axis_ddof and std_axis_ddof axis methods to MaskedArray. Existing var/std/var_axis/std_axis delegate to the new ddof variants with ddof=0 to preserve API. ddof=0 is population, ddof=1 is sample (Bessel's correction). When count <= ddof, return NaN (or mask the cell on axis variants) matching numpy. 6 tests covering ddof=0 vs ddof=1, masked elements, count<=ddof NaN behavior, std=sqrt(var) consistency, and axis variant.
